action.target: echo '[kbd-orchestrator] Phase complete — run /kbd-reflect to generate reflection report, then /kbd-new-phase to start next phase'
echo '[kbd-orchestrator] Change complete — update progress.json, then run /opsx:verify + /opsx:archive (if OpenSpec) or move to .kbd-orchestrator/changes/archive/ (if native KBD)'
echo '[kbd-orchestrator] Assessment written — run /kbd-plan to generate change list'
echo '[kbd-orchestrator] Plan written — run /kbd-execute to select backend and dispatch'
echo '[kbd-orchestrator] Cross-tool handoff — receiving tool should read current-waypoint.json and progress.json before starting'
echo '[kbd-orchestrator] Blocker detected — update progress.json status=BLOCKED, update waypoint fallback_command, commit .kbd-orchestrator/'
echo '[kbd-orchestrator] Reflection complete — waypoint advanced to next phase, run /kbd-new-phase <name> to begin'
